description: Style NoteThe perfect blend of beauty and style, this handmade necklace from adrika adds a touch of glamour to your wardrobe. Pair it with any outfit for a chic and bold look.Product DetailsFive strand neck-piece with white and black beads, tassel detail in front, metal claspMaterial and CareGlass and poth (glass) beadsWipe with soft cloth to maintain shine and keep away dust and dirtSizeLength of necklace: 60 cm
